name: Easy Crock Pot Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger with onion, bell pepper, and garlic. Drain well.
2. Add the browned ingredients to the crockpot along with all other ingredients.
3. Cook on high until the sauce comes to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 6 hours.
5. Serve hot over favorite noodles (such as egg noodles) and enjoy with garlic bread and a fresh salad.
6. Chopped bell pepper and celery can be kept in the freezer until ready to use. Always rinse well before adding to recipes to remove any freezer taste.
